name: Ananyo Roy
quote: The Live Project gave me a real deliverable I could speak to in every interview. TAS asked about it in all three rounds - it was the differentiator that got me the offer.

name: Tanisha Sen
quote: The mock GDs and PI prep were completely different from generic coaching - domain-specific, company-specific, and brutally honest. Times of India shortlisted me on Day 1.

name: Pradipto Mondal
quote: Doing consulting and operations projects together gave me the edge. AAICLAS was looking for exactly the cross-functional thinking the live project built.

name: Nikhil Gandhi
quote: AB InBev wanted real marketing thinking, not theory. The FMCG live project made me stand out in every round - I had real data and a real story to tell.

name: Aparna Sudhir
quote: Deloitte asked me to walk through my project deliverable in the final round. MBA Partner's live project was the only thing on my CV that was genuinely mine.

name: Bolagani Premchand
quote: Amazon's PM round was intense. The case comp training and mock PIs built the structure I needed under pressure. Got the offer on Final Placement Day 1.

name: Swarnil Sinha
program: Live Projects + Master Bootcamp + Case Comps
quote: Three programs, one enrollment through the All-In-One. Leap India said my profile was more polished than candidates from higher-ranked colleges.

name: Akshita Satwal
quote: Titan's brand team is very selective. The structured marketing prep and live FMCG project gave me the exact language their interviewers were looking for.

name: Pavan Pawar
program: Live Projects + Case Comps + Master Bootcamp
quote: I did Marketing, Product, and Consulting live projects - each one gave me a different story to tell in interviews. The depth of mentorship here is unmatched.

name: Aayushi Gupta
quote: Amazon wanted someone who could handle Finance AND Operations. I had live project outputs in both - the mentor feedback on each deliverable made them interview-ready.

name: Yusuf Hasan
quote: Deloitte's case interview was heavily strategy-focused. The 1-on-1 mock interviews gave me the exact frameworks they use internally.

name: Madhumitha
quote: Accenture Strategy looks for structured problem solvers. The live project deliverables and CV review rounds ensured my profile stood out from the crowd.
